Title: Happy path - valid credentials
Preconditions: API running; user exists in DB
Steps: POST /users/login with valid email and password JSON
Expected Result: 200; JSON includes token and success status

Title: Invalid credentials - wrong password
Steps: POST /users/login with valid email and wrong password

Title: Invalid credentials - unknown email
Steps: POST /users/login with email not in database
Expected Result: 401; same class of error as wrong password (no user enumeration if policy requires)

Title: Missing password field
Steps: POST /users/login with JSON containing only email

Title: Missing email field
Steps: POST /users/login with JSON containing only password

Title: Invalid email format
Steps: POST /users/login with email not passing validation (e.g. not-an-email)

Title: Empty email or password strings
Steps: POST with empty strings for email and/or password per payload rules

Title: Email with leading/trailing spaces
Steps: POST with spaces around email if API accepts strip behavior
Expected Result: Consistent with schema (repo strips email in pre_load)

Title: Rate limiting after repeated failures
Steps: Send 11 failed login attempts within one minute to same endpoint
Expected Result: 429 after limit; message about too many requests

Title: Non-JSON or malformed body
Steps: POST with invalid Content-Type or malformed JSON

Title: Valid JWT
Steps: GET /users/verify-token with Authorization: Bearer <token>

Title: Missing Authorization header
Steps: GET /users/verify-token without header

Title: Invalid or expired token
Steps: GET with Bearer garbage or expired JWT
Expected Result: Not 200 success; error message per API

Title: Happy path - revoke token
Preconditions: User logged in; valid JWT from login
Steps: POST /users/logout with Authorization: Bearer <token>
Expected Result: 200; JSON success; token jti added to blacklist per server

Title: Verify-token after logout
Steps: GET /users/verify-token with same Bearer token used before logout

Title: Logout without Authorization header
Steps: POST /users/logout with no Bearer header

Title: Happy path - new user
Preconditions: Registration endpoint implemented per team spec
Steps: POST registration with all required valid fields
Expected Result: User created; success status per contract; can login
Actual Result Notes: No registration endpoint in API; Register UI is client-only

Title: Missing required fields
Steps: Omit each required field one at a time

Title: Invalid email format
Steps: Send invalid email string

Title: Duplicate email
Steps: Register twice with same email

Title: Password too short
Steps: Password below minimum length if defined

Title: Very long password
Steps: Extremely long password string

Title: Special characters in password
Steps: Unicode quotes spaces etc if allowed by policy

Title: Empty form submit
Steps: Click submit without entering fields
Expected Result: Inline error to enter email and password; no successful navigation

Title: Valid login navigates to dashboard
Steps: Enter valid credentials; submit
Expected Result: Redirect to dashboard; token stored in localStorage

Title: Wrong password shows error
Steps: Enter valid email wrong password

Title: Email field type and visibility toggle
Steps: Use email input; toggle show/hide password if present
Expected Result: Appropriate input types and accessibility labels

Title: Direct navigation to /dashboard without token
Steps: Open /dashboard in fresh session or after clearing storage
Expected Result: Redirect to login after verify fails

Title: Demo mode when API unreachable
Steps: With API stopped or network blocked; submit valid-looking login on /login
Expected Result: May still succeed with demo-token; dashboard may load without real auth

Title: Happy path
Steps: Complete form with valid data; submit
Expected Result: Local success UI per Register.jsx (no API yet)
Actual Result Notes: Register.jsx exists but no Route in App.jsx; add /register to test E2E

Title: Required field validation
Steps: Submit empty or partial form

Title: Invalid email on client
Steps: Enter malformed email

Title: Logout clears session and returns to login
Steps: Click Logout in TopBar or SideBar
Expected Result: authToken cleared; navigates to /login; cannot use app as authenticated

Title: Post-logout protected route
Steps: Navigate or refresh /dashboard
Expected Result: Redirect to login when token missing or invalid

Title: Simulated logout via storage
Steps: Remove authToken from localStorage; refresh or go to /dashboard
Expected Result: Treated as logged out; redirect to login
